Name: uptake of acetaminophen by the hepatocytes
Converted_formula: ATP[c] + H2O[c] + acetaminophen/paracetamol[e] --> ADP[c] + H+[c] + Pi[c] + acetaminophen/paracetamol[c]

Name: NAPQIhr
Converted_formula: H+[r] + NADPH[r] + O2[r] + acetaminophen/paracetamol[r] --> 2.0 H2O[r] + NADP+[r] + NAPQI[r]
